case_title: SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS BOSSETTE, JOSEPH A.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSETTE, JOSEPH A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $643.26 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT BOSSETTE, JOSEPH A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOSSETTE, JOSEPH A. $451.68 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
